description: Shares a single task list across multiple Claude Code terminal sessions. Enables cross-terminal task coordination without manual bus polling.

baseline_observations.without_feature: Each terminal maintains an independent ephemeral task list. Tasks created in one session are invisible to others. Coordination relies on bus STATUS/SITREP messages.
baseline_observations.expected_with_feature: All terminals sharing the same TASK_LIST_ID see a unified task list. TaskCreate/TaskUpdate from any terminal is immediately visible to all. Reduces coordination overhead for multi-terminal workflows.
baseline_observations.notes: Feature is an env var toggle with no runtime dependency. Risk surface is limited to task file I/O contention.
